slots.caption_ig:
Why this is the #1 pick. Execution. Meat. Tortilla. Value. Salsa. Receipts included. Every rank shows the scorecard behind it — no algorithm black box, no 'because we said so.'

#ForkFox #FoodRanked #DishNotRestaurant #FoodScience #FoodSmart
slots.caption_fb: When we say a dish is #1, we show you why. Every rank comes with a scorecard — execution, ingredient quality, ratio, value, ambiance — and you can see exactly where it scored. No black-box algorithm. No 'trust us.' Just the receipts.
slots.video_gen_prompt: Vertical 9:16 video, 7 seconds. Pulls in on a #1-ranked taco. Radar-chart scoring overlay animates in (meat / tortilla / value / salsa / execution). End frame: 'Why this is #1.' with '#1' in red. Confident, editorial.
